query:
UPDATE meetup_events
            SET title = $1, 
                description = $2,
                location = $3,
                event_hash = $4,
                duplicate_event_hash = $5,
                repeated_event_hash = $6,
                start_time = $7,
                end_time = $8,
                last_synced = $9
            WHERE meetup_event_id = $10
